column1: sup just checkin in! how things lookin on your end with everything for break
sorry that was an accident yes we are ready to pay on the 22nd
word all good. ill get the reservation started for you tomorrow
ready for the link when you are
just sent that over! lmk if you need any help getting secured on the reservation
the second date for it to be due we wanted it to be 2/5
yea all good I'll update that for you
should be all set now if you refresh the res. 2nd payment 2/05
hi- i don't have my passport accessible since it's in the mail. is there a way around the passport information page?
Yea all good you can skip the passport piece for now
It'll let you continue on. Can add it in later
how much more would it be to upgrade to the Pyramid? or can we not change the reservation now
I'll be able to find out in the am if that's cool. It def is more expensive, in my personal opinion not super worth it. But completely up to you
okay don't worry about it thanks!
hey whenever you have a sec, if you guys could upload your flight info so we can finalize your airport transfers
yes i will do that as soon as i can this weekend. thanks
hi, we're looking to book our flights this weekend and wondering if it might be cheaper through you guys. we're flying from jfk or laguardia
Hey, it'll def be cheaper online on your own
hey checkin in, did you guys get your flights yet?
yes they're in the portal under my account
bet your both on the same flight?
word added it in for her. all set

hi, are we able to get the hotel reservation number for us to sign into the oasis app and book dinner reservations at the restaurants? i've seen a lot of people say to book ahead of time and i can't without the reservation number

Hey hey. Yea I'm actually not sure if you'll be able to log into the app with our reservation since it's on our pre-arranged room block, rather than an individual reservation booked through the resort
I'll send you what we have
hey is there someone you can ask about this? that number doesn't work. i tried to call the hotel but they don't speak much english
never mind! they said i have to already be checked in. sorry
hey did you want to add any of the party pass tickets or booze cruise event to your trip?
